title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!
